utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 required items in the format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 items with entries. Next, check if each is fully specified with all required details (including costs). The format requires each coverage item to include 'with costs'. In the plan, each coverage item references an 'Estimated portion of €950/month total package' rather than a distinct cost per item; costs are not itemized per coverage, but they do indicate association to the overall monthly package cost. However, the requirement 'with costs' implies item-level cost details, not just a shared total. Thus, item-level costs are not fully specified. The total_budget item is fully specified with monthly and annual costs and savings. Therefore: items present = 5/5; fully specified according to the requirement (with costs per item) = only total_budget clearly meets its requirement; the other four include coverage descriptions but lack distinct cost breakdowns per item.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan mentions broad, non-specific package components (ConsultingPro Partner Benefits Package) without naming any specific plans from the ground-truth list. None of the referenced items (Global executive health coverage, executive liability protection, enhanced business travel insurance, concierge services) directly match the named options in the ground-truth ratings (e.g., EliteCare Premium Plan, PrimeTravel Premium Plan, EliteHome Premium Coverage). Therefore, there is no exact item-to-rating mapping possible.
